title: Brain Tumor MRI AI System
description: A medical computer vision project for brain tumor MRI classification, API inference, segmentation experiments, and simple UI prototypes.

title: MedScan AI Medical Diagnosis Platform
description: A Streamlit-based medical AI prototype with modules for medical image analysis, retinal analysis, and disease-risk prediction.

title: Breast Cancer Classification ML
description: A supervised machine learning notebook that explores breast cancer data, preprocesses features, trains multiple classifiers, and evaluates classification quality.

title: Diabetes Prediction Machine Learning
description: A set of notebooks for diabetes outcome prediction using classical ML models and model comparison workflows.

title: Obesity Risk Prediction ML
description: A machine learning notebook for obesity classification using train/test CSV files and multiple classical models.

title: AgriNova Smart Agriculture Dashboard
description: A full smart-agriculture dashboard workspace combining a Next.js dashboard, API routes, Power BI assets, and Power BI-ready CSV data.

title: Smart Agriculture ML Suite
description: A graduation-project notebook suite for crop recommendation, crop yield prediction, soil nutrient analysis, XAI, and plant disease classification.

title: Molecular Property Prediction with Graph Neural Networks
description: A graph neural network project for predicting molecular HOMO-LUMO gap values using QM9-style molecular graph data.

title: Exoplanet Detection Machine Learning
description: A machine learning project for detecting exoplanets from light-curve data, plus a Gradio light-curve viewer prototype.

title: Baby Food Ingredient Recommendation ML
description: A recommendation and classification notebook suite for baby food ingredient data using feature selection, classical ML, and tabular deep learning.

title: Retail Item Recommendation System
description: A recommender-system notebook using transactional retail data, user-item matrices, cosine similarity, and recommendation evaluation.

title: Information Retrieval and Recommender Systems
description: A group of information retrieval and recommender-system assignments covering user-item matrices, ranking metrics, and classification examples.

title: Knowledge Based Weather Recommendation System
description: A knowledge-based system notebook combining weather/country datasets, graph-like knowledge representation, Gradio, and ML classification.

title: Quantum Machine Learning Experiments
description: A set of quantum machine learning notebooks covering quantum kernels, QNN architecture, and quantum convolutional neural networks.

title: Backpack Price Prediction ML
description: A regression notebook for backpack price prediction using tabular product data and classical machine learning models.

title: Student Performance Analysis
description: A data science project for analyzing student exam performance and clustering patterns with K-Means.

title: Titanic Survival Prediction ML
description: A classic Titanic survival prediction notebook with preprocessing, model training, and accuracy evaluation.

title: Agglomerative Clustering Analysis
description: A clustering notebook using hierarchical clustering, dendrogram visualization, imputation, label encoding, and feature scaling.

title: Hybrid Optimization Algorithms
description: An optimization research/code project combining Hippopotamus Optimization, Secretary Bird Optimization, hierarchical hybrid methods, GA, PSO, and path optimization notebooks.

title: AI Learning Website
description: A static educational website covering AI models, machine learning, and deep learning topics.

title: FinLit Egypt Financial Literacy Platform
description: A financial literacy platform with calculators, educational resources, user account flows, charts, and an Express server.

title: Robotics Research Paper
description: A research document archive containing a robotics paper draft.
